  • Overview

  • Help

Uses of Interface
org.moeaframework.core.Algorithm

Packages that use Algorithm
Package
Description
org.moeaframework
Convenience classes for using the MOEA Framework.
org.moeaframework.algorithm
Implementations of various algorithms and support tools for working with algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.continuation
Extends an algorithm with "continuations" or "restarts", where we periodically reseed an algorithm with random solutions and optionally adjust the settings.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.extension
 
org.moeaframework.algorithm.pso
Implementations of various Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.sa
Implementations of various simulated annealing (SA) algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.single
Implementations of various single-objective optimization algorithms.
org.moeaframework.analysis.collector
Collectors record information periodically during the execution of an algorithm.
org.moeaframework.core
Contains the core classes used by this framework.
org.moeaframework.core.spi
Defines the service provider interfaces (SPIs) and factories for constructing problems, algorithms and operators.
org.moeaframework.core.termination
Defines conditions for terminating runs.
org.moeaframework.parallel.island
Implementation of the island model parallelization strategy.
org.moeaframework.util.progress
Collection of classes for managing progress reporting, including providing listeners for receiving progress updates and estimating remaining time.

  • Uses of Algorithm in org.moeaframework

    Methods in org.moeaframework with type parameters of type Algorithm
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T extends Algorithm>
    InstrumentedAlgorithm<T>
    Instrumenter.instrument(T algorithm)
    Instruments the specified algorithm, returning an InstrumentedAlgorithm to be used to execute the algorithm and store the data produced by any attached instruments.
    Methods in org.moeaframework with parameters of type Algorithm
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    Instrumenter.instrument(Algorithm algorithm, InstrumentedExtension extension, List<Collector> collectors, Set<Object> visited, Stack<Object> parents, Object object, Class<?> type)
    Recursively walks the object graph to 1) determine the nesting of objects to help determine which objects are to be instrumented; and 2) attach the Collectors to any matching objects.

  • Uses of Algorithm in org.moeaframework.algorithm

    Classes in org.moeaframework.algorithm that implement Algorithm
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractAlgorithm
    Abstract class providing default implementations for several Algorithm methods.
    class 
    AbstractEvolutionaryAlgorithm
    Abstract class providing default implementations for several EvolutionaryAlgorithm methods.
    class 
    AGEMOEAII
    Implementation of AGE-MOEA-II, which is an adaptive evolutionary algorithm that estimates the Pareto front geometry and uses this to score solutions during selection.
    class 
    Checkpoints
    Deprecated.
    Use CheckpointExtension instead
    class 
    CMAES
    The Covariance Matrix Adaption Evolution Strategy (CMA-ES) algorithm for single and multi-objective problems.
    class 
    DBEA
    Implementation of the Improved Decomposition-Based Evolutionary Algorithm (I-DBEA).
    class 
    EpsilonMOEA
    Implementation of the ε-MOEA algorithm.
    class 
    EpsilonNSGAII
    Implements the ε-NSGA-II algorithm.
    class 
    GDE3
    Implementation of the Generalized Differential Evolution (GDE3) algorithm.
    class 
    IBEA
    Implementation of the Indicator-Based Evolutionary Algorithm (IBEA).
    class 
    MOEAD
    Implementation of MOEA/D, the multiobjective evolutionary algorithm with decomposition.
    class 
    MSOPS
    Implementation of the Multiple Single Objective Pareto Sampling (MSOPS) algorithm.
    class 
    NSGAII
    Implementation of NSGA-II, with the ability to attach an optional ε-dominance archive.
    class 
    NSGAIII
    Implementation of NSGA-III.
    class 
    PAES
    Implementation of the (1+1) Pareto Archived Evolution Strategy (PAES).
    class 
    PESA2
    Implementation of the Pareto Envelope-based Selection Algorithm (PESA2).
    class 
    RandomSearch
    Random search implementation.
    class 
    RVEA
    Implementation of the Reference Vector Guided Evolutionary Algorithm (RVEA).
    class 
    SMSEMOA
    Implementation of the S-metric Selection MOEA (SMS-MOEA).
    class 
    SPEA2
    Implementation of the strength-based evolutionary algorithm (SPEA2).
    class 
    UNSGAIII
    Implementation of the "unified" NSGA-III, or U-NSGA-III, which improves selection pressure by replacing the random selection of NSGA-III with tournament selection.
    class 
    VEGA
    Implementation of the Vector Evaluated Genetic Algorithm (VEGA).
    Methods in org.moeaframework.algorithm that return Algorithm
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Algorithm
    AlgorithmException.getAlgorithm()
    Returns the algorithm responsible for this exception.
    Constructors in org.moeaframework.algorithm with parameters of type Algorithm
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AlgorithmException(Algorithm algorithm, String message)
    Constructs an algorithm exception originating from the specified algorithm with the given message.
     
    AlgorithmException(Algorithm algorithm, String message, Throwable cause)
    Constructs an algorithm exception originating from the specified algorithm with the given message and cause.
     
    AlgorithmException(Algorithm algorithm, Throwable cause)
    Constructs an algorithm exception originating from the specified algorithm with the given cause.
     
    AlgorithmInitializationException(Algorithm algorithm, String message)
    Constructs an algorithm initialization exception originating from the specified algorithm with the given message.
     
    AlgorithmTerminationException(Algorithm algorithm, String message)
    Constructs an algorithm termination exception originating from the specified algorithm with the given message.
     
    Checkpoints(Algorithm algorithm, File stateFile, int checkpointFrequency)
    Deprecated.
    Decorates an algorithm to periodically save checkpoints from which the algorithm can resume itself if unexpectedly terminated.

    Class
    Description
    class 
    AdaptiveTimeContinuation
    Deprecated.
    Use AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtension instead
    class 
    EpsilonProgressContinuation
    Deprecated.
    Use EpsilonProgressContinuationExtension instead

    LoggingExtension.info(Algorithm algorithm, String message, Object... params)
    Writes an informational (Level.INFO) log message if the algorithm has logging enabled.

    Writes a log message if the algorithm has logging enabled.

    LoggingExtension.onStep(Algorithm algorithm)

    CheckpointExtension.onTerminate(Algorithm algorithm)

    Extension.onTerminate(Algorithm algorithm)
    Called after the termination of an algorithm.
    void
    LoggingExtension.onTerminate(Algorithm algorithm)
     
    static void
    LoggingExtension.severe(Algorithm algorithm, String message, Object... params)
    Writes a severe (Level.SEVERE) log message if the algorithm has logging enabled.
    static void
    LoggingExtension.warning(Algorithm algorithm, String message, Object... params)
    Writes a warning (Level.WARNING) log message if the algorithm has logging enabled.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractPSOAlgorithm
    Abstract multi-objective particle swarm optimizer (MOPSO).
    class 
    OMOPSO
    Implementation of OMOPSO, a multi-objective particle swarm optimizer (MOPSO).
    class 
    SMPSO
    Implementation of SMPSO, the speed-constrained multi-objective particle swarm optimizer.

    Classes in org.moeaframework.algorithm.single that implement Algorithm
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DifferentialEvolution
    Single-objective differential evolution (DE) algorithm.
    class 
    EvolutionStrategy
    Single-objective (mu + lambda) evolution strategy (ES) algorithm.
    class 
    GeneticAlgorithm
    Single-objective genetic algorithm (GA) implementation with elitism.
    class 
    RepeatedSingleObjective
    Instantiates and runs several instances of a single objective algorithm.
    class 
    SimulatedAnnealing
    Implementation of single-objective simulated annealing.
    class 
    SingleObjectiveEvolutionaryAlgorithm
    Abstract class for building single-objective evolutionary algorithms.

    Constructor

    Methods in org.moeaframework.core.spi that return Algorithm
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Algorithm
    AlgorithmFactory.getAlgorithm(String name, Problem problem)
    Searches through all discovered AlgorithmProvider instances, returning an instance of the algorithm with the registered name.
    Algorithm
    AlgorithmFactory.getAlgorithm(String name, TypedProperties properties, Problem problem)
    Searches through all discovered AlgorithmProvider instances, returning an instance of the algorithm with the registered name.
    abstract Algorithm
    AlgorithmProvider.getAlgorithm(String name, TypedProperties properties, Problem problem)
    Returns the algorithm with the specified name, or null if this provider does not support the algorithm.
    Algorithm
    IndirectAlgorithmProvider.getAlgorithm(String name, TypedProperties properties, Problem problem)
     
    Algorithm
    RegisteredAlgorithmProvider.getAlgorithm(String name, TypedProperties properties, Problem problem)
